summary: Comprehensive testing of Auth Lockdown, Closed Beta/Invite Code System, and Beta Signup Page. Fixed critical bug in AdminBetaPage.js where API URLs had double /api prefix. All 27 test cases passed after fix.

integration_issues.issue: API URLs had double /api/api prefix (e.g., ${API}/api/admin/beta-signups instead of ${API}/admin/beta-signups)
integration_issues.fix_applied: Removed extra /api from all API calls in AdminBetaPage.js

passed_tests: TEST 1: Landing page loads successfully
TEST 2: Hero 'join the hive' button found
TEST 3: Waitlist modal opens (not signup modal)
TEST 4: Waitlist modal has 'join the waitlist' button linking to /beta
TEST 5: /hive redirects to / (landing page) when not logged in
TEST 6: /explore redirects to / (landing page) when not logged in
TEST 7: /collection redirects to / (landing page) when not logged in
TEST 8: /settings redirects to / (landing page) when not logged in
TEST 9: /profile/demo redirects to / (landing page) when not logged in
TEST 10: /beta is accessible without login
TEST 10a: Beta signup page container found
TEST 10b: All beta form fields present (first name, email, instagram, feature dropdown, submit)
TEST 11: /about is accessible without login
TEST 12: /login is accessible without login
TEST 12a: 'Join the waitlist' link found on login page
TEST 12b: No 'Sign up' link present on login page
TEST 13: /join is accessible without login
TEST 13a: /join without code shows error message
TEST 14: Beta signup shows confirmation message ('you're on the list')
TEST 15: Admin logged in and redirected to /hive
TEST 16: Admin can access /admin/beta
TEST 16a: Admin beta page container found
TEST 16b: Both tabs (Beta Signups, Invite Codes) present
TEST 16e: Generate invite code button visible
TEST 17: Admin panel shows correct beta signups data (after API fix)
TEST 18: Non-admin redirected from /admin/beta to /hive
TEST 19: /join with valid code shows signup form
TEST 19a: All invite form fields present (username, email, password, confirm password, submit)
TEST 20: Invite registration successful, redirected to /hive
TEST 21: Generate invite code button works
TEST 21a: Invite codes table visible with new code
TEST 21b: 'Copy Link' buttons visible for unused codes
TEST 22a: Logged-in user can access /hive
TEST 22b: Logged-in user can access /explore
TEST 22c: Logged-in user can access /collection
seed_data_creation: Multiple test beta signups and invite code registrations created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three major features verified working: 1) Auth lockdown redirects unauthenticated users to / (landing page), not /login. 2) Closed beta system with invite codes fully functional - admin can generate codes, copy links, view who used codes. 3) Beta signup page at /beta saves to DB and shows confirmation. FIXED: AdminBetaPage.js had double /api prefix issue causing 0 data to show.

closed_beta_system.waitlist_modal: Opens from 'join the hive' button, links to /beta
closed_beta_system.login_page: Shows 'Join the waitlist' link instead of 'Sign up'

mocked_api_note: Resend email API will not actually send emails since RESEND_API_KEY is empty, but the signup still saves to DB
